ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shipping_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping rate entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code where the rate applies */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the rate applies */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal code applicable to the rate */,
  "weight_threshold" REAL /* Minimum weight for this shipping rate */,
  "shipping_price" REAL /* Shipping price associated with this rate */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping method associated with this rate */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency associated with this rate */,
  "is_promotional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rate is part of a promotional offer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_rates_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES shipping_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_rates_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currency_rates ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_rates_zip_code FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code") REFERENCES postal_codes ("postal_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_rates_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_rates_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code representing the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "iso_code_3" TEXT /* 3-letter ISO code of the country */,
  "phone_code" TEXT /* Phone code of the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the country entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the country entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country to which the region belongs */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region or state */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the region entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "postal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postal code entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code associated with the postal code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state associated with the postal code */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Specific postal code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name associated with the postal code */,
  "state" TEXT /* State name associated with the postal code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the postal code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the postal code */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the postal code entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the postal code entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_codes_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_brackets" (
  "bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight bracket */,
  "min_weight" REAL /* Minimum weight for the bracket */,
  "max_weight" REAL /* Maximum weight for the bracket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weight bracket */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the weight bracket entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the weight bracket entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bracket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_rates" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency entry */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate to the base currency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the currency rate was last updated */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency for conversion (e.g., USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping method */,
  "estimated_delivery_days" INTEGER /* Estimated delivery time in days */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shipping method is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the shipping method entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the shipping method entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping method the promotion applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage for the promotion */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the promotion is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the promotion entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the promotion entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES shipping_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* The action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
